mechanics.excerpt: TRAITS ENEMY (multiple trait) Value: 1-3 The character has attracted a enemy; either single per- son Or group. The trait is worth 1 2 or 3 points depending on the power and influence of the enemy in comparison t0 the char- acter and the organization he is part of. 1-point enemy is about as powerful as the character, while 2-point enemy more powerful than the character and 3-point enemy is much more powerful than the character.
